    • eqAtLocs

      public JTerm eqAtLocs(Services services, JTerm heap1, JTerm locset1, JTerm heap2, JTerm locset2)
      Get eqAtLocs function as a term.
      Parameters:
      services - the Services object.
      heap1 - the first heap term.
      locset1 - the first location set term.
      heap2 - the first heap term.
      locset2 - the first location set term.
      Returns:
      The eqAtLocs function term.

    • eqAtLocsPost

      public JTerm eqAtLocsPost(Services services, JTerm heap1Pre, JTerm heap1Post, JTerm locset1, JTerm heap2Pre, JTerm heap2Post, JTerm locset2)
      Get eqAtLocsPost function as a term.
      Parameters:
      services - the Services object.
      heap1Pre - the first pre-heap term.
      heap1Post - the first post-heap term.
      locset1 - the first location set term.
      heap2Pre - the second pre-heap term.
      heap2Post - the second post-heap term.
      locset2 - the second location set term.
      Returns:
      The eqAtLocsPost function term.
